name: intervals-icu-mcp
description: Access your Intervals.icu training data — activities, calendar, fitness metrics, power curves, workout planning, and a managed library of saved workouts that can act as a coaching template store.

intervals_athlete_id.title: Athlete ID
intervals_athlete_id.description: Your Intervals.icu athlete ID, or leave blank to use the authenticated user

prompts.name: setup_coaching
prompts.description: Walk the athlete through a short interview, then emit philosophy.md and season.md for them to upload as Claude Project knowledge.
prompts.text: Run this prompt to bootstrap your training Project. The LLM will call get_coaching_context to seed itself with FTP, zones, and current fitness, then interview you on coaching philosophy and current season. The output is two markdown files you upload to a Claude Project — no server restart, no files on disk.
